title: Infosys expands strategic collaboration with Sunrise for IT transformation and AI readiness
detailed_summary: Infosys announced an expansion of its strategic long-term collaboration with Sunrise to accelerate Sunrise's IT transformation. Infosys will support a modern, agile, and secure technology foundation focused on IT transformation, data security, operational agility, and future AI integration. The collaboration includes Infosys's end-to-end IT services across design, development, testing, deployment, and operations, and follows consolidation of multiple vendors into a unified portfolio and transition of applications. Infosys will use its AI, analytics, and data expertise, along with elements of Infosys Topaz, to help Sunrise become an AI-powered organization and improve operational speed, efficiency, quality, service reliability, time-to-market, and personalized digital experiences.
